description_long: This bird features a streamlined body with olive-green plumage covering most of its back and wings, transitioning to a lighter, almost yellowish hue near the tail. Its head is capped with a distinct blue coloration, which contrasts with the darker, almost black facial mask that extends from the beak to the eyes. The beak is short, straight, and conical, well-suited for generalist feeding. The tail is long and appears slightly rounded at the tip, with subtle gradation in feather length. The legs are not prominently visible but appear to be dark, likely black or gray. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and agile movement through foliage.
description: A medium-sized bird with olive-green body, blue-capped head, dark facial mask, and a long, slightly rounded tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive-green back, blue head cap, and long tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad tail and subtle color gradation on the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar coloration, showing the beak and facial mask more clearly.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the blue head cap, conical beak, and symmetrical body shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive-green body with blue cap and dark facial mask
